header.title: Heart Health Guide
header.subtitle: Track vitals, learn DASH diet, and build heart-healthy habits

crisis.title: HYPERTENSIVE CRISIS WARNING
crisis.desc: Your blood pressure reading is dangerously high (≥180/120). This requires immediate medical attention.
actions: Call 911 or go to the emergency room immediately
Do not wait to see if your pressure goes down on its own
This can lead to stroke, heart attack, or organ damage

intro.title: The DASH Diet
intro.desc: Dietary Approaches to Stop Hypertension - A scientifically proven eating plan that lowers blood pressure naturally.

sodium.title: Sodium Limit
sodium.desc: Excess sodium causes water retention, increasing blood volume and pressure on artery walls.

scanner.title: ⚠️ Hidden Sodium Scanner: "Sneaky Salt" Foods
scanner.subtitle: These seemingly innocent foods pack more sodium than you think:

swaps.title: 💡 DASH-Friendly Swaps:
items: Homemade soup with low-sodium broth (200mg vs 800mg)
Roasted chicken breast instead of deli meat (70mg vs 520mg)
Fresh vegetables instead of canned (5mg vs 300mg)

vitality.title: Vitality Score
vitality.streak_good: 🔥 {{count}} day streak! Your heart is thriving

checklist.title: Daily Cardio Checklist
checklist.subtitle: Complete these habits daily to build cardiovascular strength

cardio.label: 30 Mins Zone 2 Cardio
cardio.desc: Brisk walk, cycling, or swimming at conversational pace

no_salt.label: No Added Salt at the Table

tips.title: Heart Health Essentials
items: Zone 2 cardio: Exercise at 60-70% max heart rate (you can still hold a conversation)
Potassium helps flush sodium: Aim for 4,700mg daily from whole foods
Consistency > intensity: Daily walks beat sporadic intense workouts for heart health
Monitor at the same time: Check BP in the morning for most accurate readings
